title: In Manhattan, Learning to Not Always Take ‘Yes’ for an Answer
description: A woman wanted to move to a one-bedroom, and she liked the Upper East Side. But after negotiating and signing a lease, something didn’t seem right.
author: D.W. Gibson and Katherine Marks

title: $750,000 Homes in Michigan, New Hampshire and Texas
description: And Arts & Crafts house in Detroit, a farmhouse in Sandwich and a midcentury modern in Campbell.
author: Angela Serratore

title: In Manhattan, Learning to Not Always Take ‘Yes’ for an Answer
description: A woman wanted to move to a one-bedroom, and she liked the Upper East Side. But after negotiating and signing a lease, something didn’t seem right.
author: D.W. Gibson and Katherine Marks

title: The Feud Inside England’s Community of Master Home Thatchers
description: Inside the tiny community of English master thatchers, a fight is unfolding over a tradition that may not survive.
author: Rukmini Callimachi and Jeremie Souteyrat

title: In Memphis, an Italianate Home Dripping With Texture
description: A couple found such success with their interior designer, one half joined his team.
author: Tim McKeough

title: Five Homes for Sale With Dreamy Pools
description: A 1960s compound in the Berkshires, a tropical cottage in Miami, a quintessential Hamptons house, and two California retreats.
author: Daniela Gorny

title: Kathie Lee Gifford Lists Connecticut Estate for $100 Million
description: The former TV host bids farewell to Greenwich. Ken Griffey Jr. put his Florida home on the market, while Lindsey Vonn lowers the asking price on her house in Beverly Hills, Calif.
author: Vivian Marino

title: The Growing Movement for Shelters to Make Room for Pets
description: Shelters recognize that many would rather sleep on the street than leave their animals behind.
author: Elizabeth A. Harris

title: How to Make Wallpaper Art
description: Start out with a low-stakes installation on an art canvas. You’ll learn the basics, and you can easily undo it.
author: Tim Heffernan and Clark Hodgin

title: A.I. Boom Leads to Record Home Prices in San Francisco
description: The Bay Area boasts the highest median home prices in the country and experienced the sharpest annual price increases.
author: Kami Rieck

title: How Do I Stop a Bad Landlord From Ruining My Neighborhood?
description: A well-organized group of neighbors is often the most powerful force.
author: Jill Terreri Ramos

title: $1.3 Million Homes in Sweden
description: A 10-bedroom manor from 1806, a 25-acre farm estate near the Baltic Sea, and a five-bedroom modern farmhouse.
author: Roxana Popescu

title: Homes for Sale in New York and New Jersey
description: This week’s properties are a four-bedroom in Laurel, N.Y., and a five-bedroom in Bridgewater, N.J.
author: Claudia Gryvatz Copquin and Jill P. Capuzzo

title: Homes for Sale in Brooklyn and Manhattan
description: This week’s properties are in Williamsburg, on the Upper West Side and in Hudson Heights.
author: Heather Senison

title: Still Mailing Your Rent? You’re Hardly Alone.
description: Those who pay their rent online are now the majority — but just barely.
author: Joyce Cohen

title: America’s Last Surviving Wallace Neff Bubble House Is for Sale
description: Located in Pasadena, Calif., this futuristic dome — and affordable housing prototype — still stuns.
author: Linda Laban

title: $2.8 Million Homes in New York, Pennsylvania and Tennessee
description: A 19th-century farmhouse in Red Hook, N.Y., a Frank Lloyd Wright-inspired cottage in Port Allegany, Pa., and a 1949 house in Franklin, Tenn.
author: Angela Serratore

title: A House That Adapts to Party Mode, Private Mode and Guest Mode
description: A London couple turned their four-bedroom house into a one-bedroom shape-shifter — and got a lot more room for living.
author: Tim McKeough

title: Sometimes, the Best Way to Explore a Landscape Is to Sit Down
description: Madoo, in Sagaponack, N.Y., is giving visitors a different way to view a garden, with outdoor seating in a variety of styles and colors.
author: Margaret Roach

title: A Striking Costa Rican Beach House Pays Tribute to Latin America
description: A builder and an architect collaborated on a family beach compound using local materials and with a patio and a pool at the center.
author: Tim McKeough
